---
title: "Jake Cohen Snacking Cake Recipe"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Baked Goods"]
---

**Source:**
[[https://www.instagram.com/p/Cebw2KGJeCA/]{.underline}](https://www.instagram.com/p/Cebw2KGJeCA/)

**Ingredients:**

[Jam-Swirled Olive Oil Snacking Cake]{.mark}

[1 cup granulated sugar]{.mark}

[1/2 cup light brown sugar]{.mark}

[1 cup olive oil]{.mark}

[1 cup Greek yogurt (any fat%)]{.mark}

[1 teaspoon vanilla extract]{.mark}

[1/2 teaspoon lemon, orange, or lime zest]{.mark}

[2 large eggs]{.mark}

[2 cups (270g) all-purpose flour]{.mark}

[1 1/2 teaspoons kosher salt]{.mark}

[1/2 teaspoon baking soda]{.mark}

[1/2 teaspoon baking powder]{.mark}

[1/2 cup jam]{.mark}

**Directions:**

[1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Line a 9-inch square baking pan with
parchment paper.]{.mark}

[2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the sugars, olive oil, yogurt,
vanilla, citrus zest, and eggs. Add the flour, salt, baking soda, and
baking powder and whisk until just incorporated. Scrape the batter into
the pan and spread in an even layer. Spoon over 1/2 cup jam and using a
knife or offset spatula, swirl into the batter.]{.mark}

[3. Bake for 40-45 minutes, until golden and it reaches an internal
temperature of 190°F. Let cool completely, the slice and serve.]{.mark}
